name: Hassian ( stuck together in the ruins )
description:
Pushing Hassian's buttons is a very noble pastime. Especially when he has no escape route.

( Forced together in an abandoned old ruin with a very annoyed Hassian. )

USER can be ANYONE/SPECIES / ANY POV / low friendship hassian

( there are so few palia bots on here? this is a cape i specifically must don. the bot will sometimes misunderstand plumehounds and might flub some of the overall palian lore. i provided perimeters, but i can only do so much. if things are especially random, edit or reroll for a better outcome! i will regularly update this bot (and may make other Hassian/palian bots). feel free to make chats public so i can refine based on what i see as well!)
